member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all states with their parent country info.
member.remarks:
Returns active state records including the nested country object.
Permission required: States:View
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
member.response: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.GetAllByCountry(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all active states for a specific country.
member.remarks:
Use this to populate the States dropdown after the user selects a country. Only non-deleted states are returned.
Permission required: States:View
UI usage: On country select → call this endpoint → bind results to the State dropdown.
Cascading flow:
Load countries: GET /api/v1/countries
On country select → load states: GET /api/v1/states/by-country/{countryId}
On state select → load districts: GET /api/v1/districts/by-state/{stateId}
member.returns: Array of StateResponse objects filtered to the given country.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.GetByID(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single state by ID.
member.response:
State found and returned.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "القاهرة", "nameEn" : "Cairo", "code" : "CAI", "country" : { "id": 1, "nameAr": "مصر", "nameEn": "Egypt" }, "createdOn" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "updatedOn" : null, "isDeleted" : false }
State with the given ID does not exist.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.GetStateWithDistricts(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get an active state with its active districts list populated.
member.remarks:
Use this to load the Districts dropdown when a state is selected. Only non-deleted districts are returned.
Permission required: States:View
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.Add(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Contracts.StateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Permission required: States:Create
Field rules:
FieldRequiredValidation
id OptionalSend null, omit it, or send 0 for new records.
nameAr ✅2–100 chars · Arabic letters only · unique within the same country.
nameEn ✅2–100 chars · English letters only · unique within the same country.
code ✅2–10 chars · letters, digits, or hyphen · unique within the same country. Stored uppercase. e.g. CAI, RYD
countryId ✅Valid non-deleted country ID. DROPDOWN — load from GET /api/v1/countries.
Note: Uniqueness for nameAr, nameEn, and code is scoped to the country — the same name can exist in two different countries.
member.param:
StateRequest body (JSON). id is optional for new records. Send null, omit it, or send 0.
{ "id" : 0, "nameAr" : "القاهرة", "nameEn" : "Cairo", "code" : "CAI", "countryId" : 1 }
member.response: State created successfully. Returns the new state object.
Validation failed or countryId does not reference a valid country.
nameAr, nameEn, or code already exists within the same country.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.Update(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Contracts.StateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Send the full object including the existing id. Same field rules as POST apply.
Permission required: States:Edit
member.param:
StateRequest body. id must be the existing record's ID.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "القاهرة", "nameEn" : "Cairo", "code" : "CAI", "countryId" : 1 }
member.response: State updated successfully. Returns the updated state object.
State with the given id not found.
Name or code conflict within the same country.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Toggle soft-delete state of a state (delete or restore).
member.remarks:
Soft delete only — sets IsDeleted = true. Calling again restores the record.
Cannot delete if the state has active associated districts. Soft-deleted districts do not block deletion.
Permission required: States:Delete
UI tip: On HTTP 400, show — "This state cannot be deleted because it has active associated districts."
member.response: State is referenced by one or more active districts and cannot be deleted.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.States.Controllers.V1.StatesController.GetCount(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the total count of active (non-deleted) states.
member.remarks:
Permission required: States:View
Use this to display a summary card at the top of the States page.
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
